parsed.answer: Based on my understanding, on the left side of the Claude Code startup screen, the following elements appear from top to bottom: (1) A small ASCII/Unicode art logo or icon representing Claude/Anthropic, (2) The product name 'Claude Code', (3) Version information (e.g., 'v1.x.x' or similar), (4) Possibly the current model being used, and (5) Possibly a brief status or account info line.
